value_chain_position: Low-power programmable logic (FPGAs/PLDs) for edge AI inference, communications, automotive ADAS, and industrial control.
relative_comps: Lattice targets the small/mid-range FPGA market below where Intel Altera and AMD Xilinx compete; its power-efficient Nexus/CertusPro platforms win in communications line cards, server management (BMC/OCP) and automotive ADAS. It is not a primary AI training/inference chip — its AI relevance is in edge inference and smart-NIC applications. Revenue shrank over 3 years (-7% CAGR) as its industrial end-market corrected; YoY recovery is underway (+17%). Trades at ~50x forward earnings — priced for a faster recovery than fundamentals currently support.
